author: PatrikStepan
title: PyTorch Models tests fail with ECONNREFUSED downloading openvino_tokenizers_wheel artifact
signature: artifact download failed unable to make request ECONNREFUSED|Network
failed_jobs: PyTorch Models tests / PyTorch Models tests
key_errors: Action failed with error: Failed to ListArtifacts: Unable to make request: ECONNREFUSED
Unable to download artifact(s): Failed to ListArtifacts: Unable to make request: ECONNREFUSED
root_cause: Self-hosted runner lost network connectivity to GitHub Actions artifact service while trying to download the 'openvino_tokenizers_wheel' artifact. ECONNREFUSED indicates the runner's TCP connection to GitHub's artifact API endpoint was refused. This is a transient infrastructure/network failure unrelated to code changes.
